evals.prompt: gh pr checkout 8 这个 PR 可以本地 worktree 跑起来，然后我看看效果
evals.expected_output: The agent protects the current worktree, checks out PR 8 in a sibling worktree, starts the app on an isolated port and instance, verifies readiness, and gives a URL plus stop/log commands.

evals.prompt: 把 PR 12 拉下来跑一下，这个改的是 issue board UI，我需要看截图再 review
evals.expected_output: The agent starts PR 12 in an isolated worktree, verifies the preview, captures relevant UI screenshots outside the repo, and returns the local URL, screenshot paths/images, logs command, and cleanup command.

evals.prompt: 关掉刚才那个 PR 预览服务
evals.expected_output: The agent stops only the PR preview session, confirms the preview port is no longer listening, and avoids killing unrelated dev runtimes.
